陈烁为帮老婆圆梦，拿出全部积蓄让她踏上选秀节目的舞台。
结果老婆刚出名就要求离婚。
没想到，离婚后的陈烁竟激活奶爸逆袭系统。
带着女儿小豆腐从一家早餐店开始，吸引了来自四面八方的食客、游客、美食博主，明星，甚至各行各业巨头大佬们也慕名而来，全都给馋哭了。
原本萧条的商业街，自此天未亮就有顾客追着陈烁开门营业，队伍排满街。
随着获得的技能越来越多，陈烁不再局限于餐饮行业……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o014d1c307c981d53c33de6c4b5beff41~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"烤个青口","author_id":"","book_id":"7358776027557940286","book_name":"和明星老婆离婚后，成为美食奶爸","book_short_name":"离婚后，美食系统带我飞","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e0d0d8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4478人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":42,"name":"奶爸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=42&name=奶爸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":78,"name":"美食","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=78&name=美食&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7358776224967033406","read_count":"4478","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"576283"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.1","serial_count":"285","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,奶爸,美食,单女主,开局,1v1,无后宫","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/842d4342ee23bdd116910d3e2be3a52e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779364109&x-signature=tTtEC2yVm072O02wLWcCDhglcU8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"111046826176","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"236"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322194829F33D716029D9FA0A9E32"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":8153,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":22704,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":2266},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7367276701839164222","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"目前来说，写的很不错，没有什么离谱的情节。不过看简介，男主后期不仅仅会涉及餐饮行业，希望在涉及其他行业的时候，比如简介里说的汽车行业，情节过度能够自然一点。另外文中提到的那个黄焖鸡老板，不知道作者要为他安排多少情节。我个人觉得能少安排就少安排，还是尽早下线吧[酷][酷][酷]。关于男主的前妻和前岳母，不知道作者打算怎么安排，千万不要安排的情节太狗血。最后也衷心希望作者能够坚持写下去，这本书确实挺不错的。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1715332583,"group_id":"7358776027557940286","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我就是我","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzhohOkq0FBIcfD1KZnjvls=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/34dd9a35dc70481c8cf6de5f0d49fdc2~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776704975&x-signature=I%2BgeCDTUyC0atq%2FYanedVFFSL%2Bk%3D","user_id":"104938964100","user_name":"dachen123"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"104938964100","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1795133982,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1
